name: Acid Splash
description: Hurl a bubble of acid at one creature (or two within 5ft of each other). DEX save or take 1d6 acid damage. +1d6 at 5/11/17.

name: Chill Touch
description: Spell attack vs target. On hit 1d8 necrotic, target can't regain HP until end of your next turn. Undead also has disadvantage on attacks vs you. +1d8 at 5/11/17.

name: Dancing Lights
description: Create up to 4 torch-sized lights in range. Bonus action to move them up to 60ft.

name: Druidcraft
description: Predict weather (24h), make a flower bud bloom, sense magical effect, light/snuff a small flame.

name: Eldritch Blast
description: Beam of crackling energy. Spell attack 1d10 force per beam. Multiple beams at 5/11/17 (2/3/4 beams).

name: Fire Bolt
description: Spell attack 1d10 fire. Ignites flammable unattended objects. +1d10 at 5/11/17.

name: Guidance
description: Touch a willing creature. Once before spell ends, target rolls 1d4 and adds to one ability check.

name: Light
description: Touched object sheds bright 20ft and dim 20ft more. Object up to 10ft creature; held creature can DEX save.

name: Mage Hand
description: Spectral hand at point in range. Manipulate objects, open unlocked door/container, stow/retrieve from open container, pour. Range up to 30 ft. Cannot attack/use magic items/carry >10 lb.

name: Mending
description: Repair a single break/tear in object touched (max 1 ft long).

name: Message
description: Whisper a message to one creature in range. They can whisper back.

name: Minor Illusion
description: Create sound or 5ft cube image. INT (Investigation) check vs spell save DC to discern illusion.

name: Poison Spray
description: Target CON save or 1d12 poison. +1d12 at 5/11/17.

name: Prestidigitation
description: Minor magical trick: sensory effect, light/snuff small flame, clean/soil object, warm/chill 1lb of nonliving material, color/mark surface, create non-functional trinket/illusory image.

name: Produce Flame
description: Flickering flame in hand. Light 10ft bright/10ft dim. Action to throw: ranged spell attack 1d8 fire. +1d8 at 5/11/17.

name: Ray of Frost
description: Spell attack 1d8 cold; target speed -10 ft until your next turn. +1d8 at 5/11/17.

name: Resistance
description: Touched creature can roll 1d4 and add to one save once before spell ends.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Target DEX save or 1d8 radiant. No cover benefit. +1d8 at 5/11/17.

name: Shillelagh
components: V S M (mistletoe/shamrock leaf and a club/quarterstaff)
description: Wood weapon (club/quarterstaff) becomes magic with 1d8 damage and uses spellcasting mod for attack/damage.

name: Shocking Grasp
description: Melee spell attack with advantage if target wearing metal. 1d8 lightning; target can't take reactions until end of next turn. +1d8 at 5/11/17.

name: Spare the Dying
description: Touch a creature with 0 HP and stable. Becomes stable.

name: Thaumaturgy
description: Voice 3x volume, flicker flames, harmless tremor, instantaneous sound, door slam, alter eyes appearance. Up to 3 effects active.

name: True Strike
description: Advantage on first attack roll vs target on next turn.

name: Vicious Mockery
description: Target WIS save or 1d4 psychic and disadvantage on next attack roll. +1d4 at 5/11/17.

name: Alarm
components: V S M (tiny silver bell + fine silver wire)
description: Set alarm in 20ft cube. Audible (heard 60ft) or mental alarm.

name: Animal Friendship
description: Beast WIS save (immune if INT 4+). On fail charmed.

name: Bane
description: Up to 3 creatures CHA save or subtract 1d4 from attacks/saves. Upcast +1 target per slot above 1st.

name: Bless
components: V S M (sprinkling of holy water)
description: Up to 3 creatures add 1d4 to attacks and saves. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Burning Hands
description: DEX save half. 3d6 fire. Ignites unattended flammables. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

name: Charm Person
description: Humanoid WIS save (advantage if attacked by you/companions). On fail charmed; treats you as friendly. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Color Spray
description: Roll 6d10 total HP affected (lowest first). Each creature in cone with HP ≤ remaining counter is blinded until your next turn. Upcast +2d10 per slot.

name: Command
description: Target WIS save (immune if can't understand). On fail follow command (approach/drop/flee/grovel/halt) on its next turn. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Comprehend Languages
components: V S M (pinch of soot and salt)
description: Understand any spoken language and read written languages you touch (1 page/min).

name: Create or Destroy Water
components: V S M (drop of water/few grains of sand)
description: Create up to 10 gal water in container or 30ft cube of rain; or destroy same volume of water/fog. Upcast +10gal or +5ft cube per slot.

name: Cure Wounds
description: Touch a creature; regain 1d8 + spellcasting mod HP. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Detect Evil and Good
description: Sense aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends/undead and consecrated/desecrated places within 30ft.

name: Detect Magic
classes: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard
description: Sense magic within 30ft. Action to focus to see faint aura and learn school.

name: Detect Poison and Disease
description: Sense poisons/poisonous creatures/disease within 30ft.

name: Disguise Self
description: Change appearance (look/clothes/voice/+/-1ft height +/-). Inspection: action + INT (Investigation) vs save DC to discern.

name: Divine Favor
description: Weapon attacks deal +1d4 radiant damage.

name: Entangle
description: 20ft square of grasping plants. STR save or restrained. Difficult terrain. STR action to free.

name: Faerie Fire
description: Each object/creature in 20ft cube DEX save or outlined; advantage on attacks vs them; can't benefit from invisibility.

name: False Life
components: V S M (small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits)
description: Gain 1d4+4 temp HP. Upcast +5 per slot above 1st.

name: Feather Fall
casting_time: 1 reaction (when you or creature within 60ft falls)
components: V M (small feather or piece of down)
description: Up to 5 falling creatures: rate 60ft/round; no fall damage. Ends on landing or duration.

name: Find Familiar
description: Summon a tiny spirit (familiar) in beast form (bat/cat/crab/frog/hawk/lizard/octopus/owl/poisonous snake/fish/rat/raven/sea horse/spider/weasel). Telepathic 100ft. Can deliver touch spells. Action to dismiss/resummon.

name: Floating Disk
description: 3ft circular horizontal disk floating 3ft off ground; carry up to 500lb. Follows you within 20ft.

name: Fog Cloud
description: 20ft radius sphere of fog; heavily obscured. Upcast +20ft radius per slot.

name: Goodberry
description: Up to 10 magical berries. One eaten = 1 HP and counts as full meal. Lasts 24h.

name: Grease
components: V S M (bit of pork rind or butter)
description: 10ft square difficult terrain. Creatures DEX save or fall prone (entering/in area on cast).

name: Guiding Bolt
description: Spell attack 4d6 radiant. Next attack vs target before end of next turn has advantage. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

name: Healing Word
description: Creature regains 1d4 + spellcasting mod HP. No undead/constructs. +1d4 per slot above 1st.

name: Hellish Rebuke
casting_time: 1 reaction (when you take damage from creature within 60ft)
description: Target DEX save half. 2d10 fire. Upcast +1d10 per slot above 1st.

name: Heroism
description: Willing creature immune to frightened; gain temp HP = spellcasting mod at start of each turn.

name: Hideous Laughter
components: V S M (tiny tarts and a feather waved in air)
description: Creature WIS save (immune if INT ≤4) or fall prone laughing; incapacitated. Repeat save when damaged or each turn (with disadvantage if no LOS).

name: Hunter's Mark
description: Mark a creature; +1d6 weapon damage vs it; advantage on Perception/Survival to track. Bonus action to switch on kill. Upcast: 8h at 3rd-4th, 24h at 5th+.

name: Identify
description: Learn properties of magic item touched (uses, command word, charges) or any spells affecting object/creature.

name: Illusory Script
description: Write secret message visible only to specified creatures.

name: Inflict Wounds
description: Melee spell attack 3d10 necrotic. +1d10 per slot above 1st.

name: Jump
description: Touched creature's jump distance tripled.

name: Longstrider
description: Touched creature speed +10. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Mage Armor
components: V S M (piece of cured leather)
description: Willing creature without armor: AC 13 + DEX mod. Ends if armor donned or dismissed.

name: Magic Missile
description: 3 darts auto-hit, each 1d4+1 force. Distribute as desired. Upcast +1 dart per slot above 1st.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
components: V S M (holy water or powdered silver and iron - consumed)
description: Target protected vs aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends/undead: they have disadvantage on attacks vs target; target advantage on saves vs them; can't be charmed/frightened/possessed.

name: Purify Food and Drink
description: All food/drink in 5ft radius purified.

name: Sanctuary
description: Creature attacking warded: WIS save or choose new target. Save DC same as spell. Ends if warded attacks/casts harmful spell.

name: Shield
casting_time: 1 reaction (when hit by attack or targeted by magic missile)
description: +5 AC until start of next turn (incl. triggering attack). No damage from magic missile.

name: Shield of Faith
components: V S M (small parchment with holy text)
description: Target +2 AC.

name: Silent Image
description: 15ft cube illusion. No sound/smell/temp. INT (Investigation) action vs DC.

name: Sleep
components: V S M (pinch of fine sand/rose petals/cricket)
description: 5d8 HP total. Affect creatures from lowest to highest HP within 20ft sphere; sleeping unconscious. Undead/charm-immune unaffected. Upcast +2d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Speak with Animals
description: Communicate with beasts (limited).

name: Thunderwave
description: Each creature CON save half. 2d8 thunder. Pushed 10ft on fail. Audible 300ft. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Unseen Servant
components: V S M (piece of string and bit of wood)
description: Invisible mindless servant. STR 2; AC 10; HP 1; speed 15. Bonus action to direct.

name: Witch Bolt
components: V S M (twig from tree struck by lightning)
description: Spell attack. On hit 1d12 lightning + sustained beam: action each turn for 1d12 lightning. Upcast +1d12 initial per slot above 1st.

name: Acid Arrow
components: V S M (powdered rhubarb leaf and adder's stomach)
description: Spell attack 4d4 acid + 2d4 acid at end of next turn. Half on miss (no end-of-next damage). Upcast +1d4 immediate and +1d4 delayed per slot.

name: Aid
components: V S M (tiny strip of white cloth)
description: Up to 3 creatures HP max +5 and current HP +5. Upcast +5 HP per slot above 2nd.

name: Alter Self
description: Aquatic Adaptation OR Change Appearance OR Natural Weapons (1d6 + STR/DEX magic).

name: Animal Messenger
description: Send tiny beast with 25-word message to a destination.

name: Arcane Lock
description: Lock object/door. DC +10 to break/pick. Set password to bypass.

name: Augury
description: Receive omen for action within next 30 min: weal/woe/weal and woe/nothing.

name: Barkskin
components: V S M (handful of oak bark)
description: Willing creature AC ≥16 (regardless of armor).

name: Blindness/Deafness
description: Creature CON save or blinded or deafened (your choice). Save at end of each turn. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Blur
description: Attacks vs you have disadvantage (unless attacker uses non-sight or has blindsight/truesight).

name: Branding Smite
description: Next weapon hit this turn deals +2d6 radiant; if invisible target becomes visible; gives off dim light 5ft. Upcast +1d6 per slot.

name: Calm Emotions
description: Each humanoid in 20ft radius CHA save. On fail: end charmed/frightened OR suppress hostility (won't attack you).

name: Continual Flame
description: Permanent torch-light flame on touched object. No heat/fuel.

name: Darkness
components: V M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or coal)
description: 15ft sphere magical darkness. Darkvision can't see through. Light spell ≤2nd is suppressed.

name: Darkvision
description: Willing creature gains darkvision 60ft.

name: Detect Thoughts
description: Probe surface thoughts of creature within 30ft (WIS save to resist deeper probe).

name: Enhance Ability
components: V S M (fur or feather of a beast)
description: Bear's Endurance/Bull's Strength/Cat's Grace/Eagle's Splendor/Fox's Cunning/Owl's Wisdom: advantage on chosen ability checks; some +temp HP or +carrying. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Enlarge/Reduce
description: Enlarge: size +1 category, advantage on STR checks/saves, +1d4 weapon damage. Reduce: size -1 category, disadvantage on STR checks/saves, -1d4 weapon damage. CON save to resist if unwilling.

name: Enthrall
description: WIS save or disadvantage on Perception checks vs anyone except you for duration.

name: Find Steed
description: Summon spirit-bound mount (warhorse/pony/camel/elk/mastiff). Intelligent; bond with rider; communication.

name: Find Traps
description: Sense if traps present in line of sight; doesn't reveal location/type.

name: Flame Blade
description: Fiery blade in hand. Action to attack 3d6 fire (melee spell attack). Sheds bright 10ft/dim 10ft. Upcast +1d6 per 2 slots.

name: Flaming Sphere
description: 5ft sphere of fire. DEX save half 2d6 fire on creatures within 5ft (auto on cast). Bonus action to move 30ft. Ram into creature: DEX save. Upcast +1d6 per slot above 2nd.

name: Gentle Repose
components: V S M (pinch of salt and copper pieces on eyes)
description: Corpse no decay; doesn't become undead.

name: Gust of Wind
description: 60ft line × 10ft wide of strong wind. STR save or pushed 15ft. Halves movement of creatures going against. Disperses gas/fog. Bonus action redirect.

name: Heat Metal
components: V S M (piece of iron and a flame)
description: Metal object glows red. Holding/wearing creature 2d8 fire on cast. Bonus action to repeat. CON save or drop and have disadvantage on attacks/checks. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Hold Person
components: V S M (small straight piece of iron)
classes: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard
description: Humanoid WIS save or paralyzed. Repeat save end of each turn. Upcast +1 target per slot above 2nd.

name: Invisibility
components: V S M (eyelash in gum arabic)
description: Touched creature invisible. Ends if attacks/casts spell. Upcast +1 target per slot above 2nd.

name: Knock
description: Open one locked/stuck/barred object. Suppresses arcane lock for 10 min. Loud knock 300ft.

name: Lesser Restoration
description: End one disease or one condition: blinded/deafened/paralyzed/poisoned.

name: Levitate
components: V S M (small leather loop or piece of golden wire bent into a cup)
description: One creature/object up to 500lb. Rises 20ft. CON save resist if unwilling. Move up to 20ft up/down per turn.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
components: V S M (bit of fur from a bloodhound)
description: Sense location/direction of nearest specified beast or plant within 5 miles.

name: Locate Object
classes: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard
description: Sense direction of object you've seen up to 1000ft (or nearest of a kind).

name: Magic Mouth
components: V S M (small bit of honeycomb and jade dust 10gp - consumed)
description: Implant message in object that delivers when triggered.

name: Magic Weapon
description: Nonmagical weapon becomes magic with +1 to attack/damage. Upcast +2 at 4th, +3 at 6th.

name: Mirror Image
description: 3 duplicates around you. Attack roll might hit a duplicate (d20 with thresholds: 6+/8+/11+ for 3/2/1 duplicates). Hit destroys duplicate.

name: Misty Step
description: Teleport up to 30ft to unoccupied space you can see.

name: Moonbeam
components: V S M (several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar)
description: 5ft radius cylinder 40ft tall. CON save half 2d10 radiant on creatures entering or starting turn in. Bonus action to move 60ft. Shapechangers disadvantage. Upcast +1d10 per slot.

name: Pass without Trace
components: V S M (ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce)
description: You and creatures within 30ft +10 Stealth and can't be tracked except by magic.

name: Phantasmal Force
description: INT save or believe phantom. Damage 1d6 psychic (perceived). INT (Investigation) to disbelieve. 10ft cube area.

name: Prayer of Healing
description: Up to 6 creatures regain 2d8 + spellcasting mod HP. Upcast +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

name: Protection from Poison
description: Neutralize one poison; advantage on saves vs poison and resistance to poison damage.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
description: Spell attack. On hit creature deals half STR weapon damage. CON save end of each turn to end.

name: Rope Trick
components: V S M (powdered corn and a twisted loop of parchment)
description: Touched rope rises 60ft into extradimensional space holding 8 medium creatures.

name: Scorching Ray
description: 3 fiery rays. Each: spell attack 2d6 fire. Upcast +1 ray per slot above 2nd.

name: See Invisibility
components: V S M (pinch of talc and a small sprinkling of powdered silver)
description: See invisible/Ethereal plane creatures and objects within 30ft.

name: Shatter
description: 10ft radius sphere. CON save half 3d8 thunder. Constructs disadvantage. Nonmagical objects break. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Silence
description: 20ft radius sphere. No sound; no V components in or through.

name: Spider Climb
components: V S M (drop of bitumen and a spider)
description: Touched creature climbs walls/ceilings hands free. Climb speed = walk speed.

name: Spike Growth
components: V S M (seven sharp thorns or pointed twigs)
description: 20ft radius difficult terrain. 2d4 piercing per 5ft moved.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: Floating weapon. Bonus action to attack: melee spell attack 1d8 + spellcasting mod force damage. Bonus action to move 20ft. Upcast +1d8 per 2 slots above 2nd.

name: Suggestion
components: V M (snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil)
description: Target WIS save or follow course of action (≤25 word) for duration.

name: Warding Bond
components: V S M (pair of platinum rings worth at least 50 gp each - one on you one on target)
description: Target +1 AC, +1 saves, resistance to all damage. You take same damage target takes. Range up to 60ft.

name: Web
description: 20ft cube webs. Difficult terrain + lightly obscured. DEX save or restrained. STR action to escape.

name: Zone of Truth
description: 15ft radius. Each creature CHA save on entry; on fail can't lie (knows attempt). Aware of zone.

name: Animate Dead
components: V S M (drop of blood, piece of flesh, pinch of bone dust)
description: Reanimate Medium/Small humanoid corpse as skeleton or zombie. Bonus action to command. Recast within 24h to maintain. Upcast +2 undead per slot.

name: Beacon of Hope
description: Any number of willing creatures: advantage on WIS saves and death saves; max HP for healing.

name: Bestow Curse
description: Touched creature WIS save. On fail one curse: disadvantage on chosen ability checks/saves; disadvantage on attacks vs caster; WIS save each turn or waste action; +1d8 necrotic from your attacks/spells. Upcast: +duration (10min/8h/24h/dispel) and concentration changes.

name: Blink
description: End of each turn d20: 11+ disappear to Ethereal until next turn end then reappear unoccupied space ≤10ft.

name: Blinding Smite
description: Next weapon hit this turn +3d8 radiant + CON save or blinded.

name: Call Lightning
description: Storm cloud 60ft radius. Action to call lightning bolt at point in range: DEX save half 3d10 lightning in 5ft cylinder. Outdoor stormy: 4d10. Upcast +1d10 per slot.

name: Clairvoyance
components: V S M (focus jeweled horn worth 100gp or eye of newt)
description: Invisible sensor at chosen location: see/hear (your choice).

name: Conjure Animals
description: Summon: 1 CR2/2 CR1/4 CR1-2/8 CR1-4 fey beasts. Upcast: scale up. Friendly to you and companions.

name: Counterspell
casting_time: 1 reaction (when you see creature within 60ft casting spell)
description: Spell ≤3rd auto-fails. Higher: ability check 1d20 + spellcasting mod vs DC 10 + spell level.

name: Create Food and Water
description: 45lb food + 30 gal water (lasts 24h).

name: Crusader's Mantle
description: Friendly creatures in aura: weapon attacks deal +1d4 radiant.

name: Daylight
classes: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Wizard
description: 60ft radius bright sunlight + 60ft dim. Suppresses ≤3rd-level magical darkness.

name: Dispel Magic
classes: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard
description: End spell ≤3rd-level on target. Higher: ability check 1d20 + spellcasting mod vs DC 10 + spell level. Upcast: auto-end spells ≤ slot level.

name: Elemental Weapon
description: Nonmagical weapon becomes magic +1 attack/damage; +1d4 chosen damage type (acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder). Upcast: +2/+2d4 at 5th-6th, +3/+3d4 at 7th+.

name: Fear
components: V S M (white feather or heart of a hen)
description: WIS save or frightened. On turn must Dash away. Save end of each turn (with disadvantage if no LOS).

name: Feign Death
components: V S M (pinch of graveyard dirt)
description: Willing target appears dead; resistance to all damage except psychic; immune to poison/disease.

name: Fireball
components: V S M (tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)
description: 20ft radius sphere. DEX save half. 8d6 fire. Ignites unattended flammables. Upcast +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

name: Fly
components: V S M (a wing feather from any bird)
description: Touched creature flying speed 60ft. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Gaseous Form
components: V S M (bit of gauze and a wisp of smoke)
description: Willing creature becomes misty cloud; flight 10ft; resistance to nonmagical damage; advantage on STR/DEX/CON saves; pass through small openings; can't attack or cast.

name: Glyph of Warding
components: V S M (incense and powdered diamond worth 200gp - consumed)
description: Triggered explosive (5d8 chosen type) or stored spell (≤3rd). Upcast: damage scales; stored spell up to slot level.

name: Haste
components: V S M (a shaving of licorice root)
description: Willing creature: speed ×2; +2 AC; advantage on DEX saves; extra action (Attack 1 weapon attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, Use Object). End: can't move/act for 1 turn.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
components: S M (a glowing stick of incense or a crystal vial filled with phosphorescent material)
description: 30ft cube. WIS save or charmed; incapacitated; speed 0. Damage ends.

name: Lightning Bolt
components: V S M (a bit of fur and a rod of amber crystal or glass)
description: 100ft line × 5ft. DEX save half. 8d6 lightning. Upcast +1d6 per slot.

name: Magic Circle
components: V S M (holy water or powdered silver and iron worth 100gp - consumed)
description: 10ft radius × 20ft cylinder vs chosen creature type (celestials/elementals/fey/fiends/undead): can't enter; disadvantage on attacks vs creatures inside; can't charm/frighten/possess. Reverse to trap. Upcast: +1h per slot.

name: Major Image
description: 20ft cube illusion with sound, smell, temperature. INT (Investigation) action vs save DC. Upcast: 6th = duration without concentration up to 10 days.

name: Mass Healing Word
description: Up to 6 creatures: 1d4 + spellcasting mod HP. Upcast +1d4 per slot.

name: Meld into Stone
description: Step into a stone object/surface large enough. Mostly invisible/inaudible.

name: Nondetection
components: V S M (pinch of diamond dust 25gp - consumed)
description: Hide creature/place/object from divination magic.

name: Phantom Steed
description: Quasi-real horse-like steed. AC 11; HP 1; speed 100. Disappears when reduced to 0 HP.

name: Plant Growth
description: Action: 100ft radius difficult terrain. 8h: enrich plants in 1/2 mile radius for 1 year.

name: Protection from Energy
description: Resistance to chosen energy type (acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder).

name: Remove Curse
description: End all curses on creature/object touched.

name: Revivify
description: Creature died within 1 minute returns with 1 HP. Doesn't return creature with missing body parts or that died of old age.

name: Sending
description: Send 25-word message to known creature. Recipient can reply.

name: Sleet Storm
components: V S M (pinch of dust and a few drops of water)
description: 20ft radius × 40ft cylinder. Heavily obscured. Difficult terrain. Open flames doused. DEX save on entering or fall prone. Concentration save (CON) when starting turn in.

name: Slow
components: V S M (a drop of molasses)
description: Up to 6 creatures in 40ft cube WIS save. On fail: speed halved; -2 AC and DEX saves; only one action OR bonus; 50% chance casting fails action and bonus needed. Save end of each turn.

name: Speak with Dead
description: Up to 5 questions to corpse with mouth. Cryptic answers.

name: Speak with Plants
description: Plants in 30ft answer questions; turn difficult terrain into normal.

name: Spirit Guardians
description: 15ft radius difficult terrain to enemies. WIS save half 3d8 radiant or necrotic on entering or starting turn. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Stinking Cloud
components: V S M (rotten egg or several skunk cabbage leaves)
description: 20ft radius cloud. Heavily obscured. CON save or use action retching for that turn. Wind disperses.

name: Tiny Hut
description: Immobile dome (10ft radius). 9 medium creatures. Comfortable interior. Opaque from outside one-way.

name: Tongues
components: V M (small clay model of a ziggurat)
description: Touched creature understands and speaks any spoken language.

name: Vampiric Touch
description: Melee spell attack 3d6 necrotic; you regain half (round down). Repeat as action each turn. Upcast +1d6 per slot.

name: Water Breathing
components: V S M (a short reed or piece of straw)
description: Up to 10 creatures breathe underwater.

name: Water Walk
description: Up to 10 creatures walk on liquid surfaces.

name: Wind Wall
components: V S M (a tiny fan and a feather of exotic origin)
description: 50ft long × 15ft high × 1ft wall. STR save or 3d8 bludgeoning + push. Tiny flying creatures can't pass; ranged ammo deflected.

name: Arcane Eye
components: V S M (bit of bat fur)
description: Invisible magical eye 30ft normal vision and 30ft darkvision. Action to move 30ft in any direction.

name: Banishment
components: V S M (item distasteful to target)
description: CHA save or banished to harmless plane (or home plane if not native; permanent if not native and concentration runs full 1 minute). Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Black Tentacles
components: V S M (piece of tentacle from giant octopus or giant squid)
description: 20ft square difficult terrain. DEX save on entry/start of turn. On fail 3d6 bludgeoning + restrained. Restrained: STR/DEX action to escape.

name: Blight
description: CON save half. 8d8 necrotic. Disadvantage if plant. Plant auto-fail. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Compulsion
description: Each visible creature in range WIS save or charmed. Use bonus action to direct: each affected creature uses movement to move toward chosen direction.

name: Confusion
description: 10ft radius sphere. WIS save or random behavior (d10) each turn. Save end of each turn. Upcast +5ft per slot.

name: Conjure Minor Elementals
description: Summon 1 CR2/2 CR1/4 CR1-2/8 CR1-4 elementals. Upcast: scale.

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
components: V S M (one holly berry per creature)
description: Summon fey: 1 CR2/2 CR1/4 CR1-2/8 CR1-4. Upcast: scale.

name: Control Water
components: V S M (drop of water and pinch of dust)
description: One of: Flood/Part Water/Redirect Flow/Whirlpool. Affects 100ft cube.

name: Death Ward
description: First time target would drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead. If hit by death effect, negate. Spell ends.

name: Dimension Door
description: Teleport self (and one willing creature within 5ft) to specified location.

name: Divination
components: V S M (incense and offering 25gp - consumed)
description: Receive truthful answer about specific goal/event/activity within next 7 days.

name: Dominate Beast
description: Beast WIS save or charmed and follow telepathic commands. Save end of each turn (when damaged with advantage). Upcast: 5th=10min/6th=1h/7th+=8h.

name: Faithful Hound
components: V S M (tiny silver whistle, piece of bone, thread)
description: Invisible watchdog. Barks if creature Small or larger within 30ft (audible 100ft). Action to attack provoking creature: +spell attack 4d8 piercing.

name: Fire Shield
components: V S M (a bit of phosphorus or a firefly)
description: Bright light 10ft + dim 10. Resistance to chosen (cold OR fire). Creature within 5ft hitting you with melee takes 2d8 damage opposite type.

name: Freedom of Movement
components: V S M (leather strap bound around the arm or similar appendage)
description: Movement unaffected by difficult terrain. Spells/effects can't reduce speed or paralyze/restrain. 5ft to escape grapples nonmagically.

name: Giant Insect
description: Up to 10 centipedes/3 spiders/5 wasps/1 scorpion become giant versions. Obey commands.

name: Greater Invisibility
description: Touched creature invisible while attacking and casting.

name: Guardian of Faith
description: Large spectral guardian. Hostile creature within 10ft DEX save half 20 radiant or necrotic. Disappears after 60 damage dealt.

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
description: 150ft cube terrain visually disguised. Touch reveals.

name: Ice Storm
components: V S M (pinch of dust and a few drops of water)
description: 20ft radius × 40ft cylinder. DEX save half. 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold. Difficult terrain (1 turn). Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Locate Creature
components: V S M (bit of fur from a bloodhound)
classes: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard
description: Sense direction of known creature within 1000ft.

name: Phantasmal Killer
description: Target WIS save or frightened. Save end of each turn or take 4d10 psychic. Upcast +1d10 per slot.

name: Polymorph
description: WIS save (willing auto-fail). Transformed into beast with CR ≤ target level. New stats; original mind. Damage transfers when shape ends.

name: Private Sanctum
components: V S M (thin sheet of lead, piece of opaque glass, wad of cotton or cloth, powdered chrysolite)
description: 100ft cube. Sound/divination/teleport/planar travel/scrying blocked.

name: Resilient Sphere
components: V S M (hemispherical piece of clear crystal and a matching hemispherical piece of gum arabic)
description: DEX save (sphere around target). No damage in/out. Sphere can be moved. Disintegrate ends.

name: Stone Shape
description: Form medium stone object: weapon, statue, door, etc.

name: Stoneskin
description: Resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing.

name: Wall of Fire
components: V S M (a small piece of phosphorus)
description: 60ft long × 20ft high × 1ft (or 20ft radius ring × 20ft tall). DEX save half. 5d8 fire on entry/start of turn on hot side. 5d8 to creatures within 10ft of cold side. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Animate Objects
description: Up to 10 nonmagical objects animate. Stats by size. Upcast +2 per slot above 5th.

name: Antilife Shell
description: Living creatures can't enter shell.

name: Awaken
components: V S M (an agate worth at least 1000 gp - consumed)
description: Beast/plant gains INT 10, languages, charmed for 30 days.

name: Cloudkill
description: 20ft radius poisonous fog. CON save half. 5d8 poison. Heavily obscured. Moves 10ft from caster each round. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Commune
components: V S M (incense and a vial of holy/unholy water)
description: Up to 3 yes/no questions to deity (1 question typical).

name: Commune with Nature
description: Learn 3 facts about local terrain (3 mile radius outdoors / 300ft underground).

name: Conjure Elemental
components: V S M (burning incense for air, soft clay for earth, sulfur and phosphorus for fire, water and sand for water)
description: Summon CR ≤5 elemental.

name: Conjure Volley
components: V S M (one piece of ammunition or a thrown weapon)
description: 40ft radius × 20ft cylinder ammo barrage. DEX save half 8d8 of ammo type.

name: Contact Other Plane
description: INT save DC 15 or 6d6 psychic and insane until long rest. Ask up to 5 questions.

name: Contagion
description: Touch attack. CON save 3 times: 3 fail = poisoned and disease (blinding sickness/filth fever/flesh rot/mindfire/seizure/slimy doom).

name: Creation
components: V S M (tiny piece of matter of the same type as item to create)
description: Create 5ft cube of nonliving matter. Lasts varies by type (vegetable matter 1 day; stone 1 hour; gems 10 minutes).

name: Destructive Wave
description: CON save half. 5d6 thunder + 5d6 chosen radiant or necrotic. On fail: prone.

name: Dispel Evil and Good
components: V S M (holy water or powdered silver and iron)
description: Aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends/undead disadvantage on attacks vs you. End: dismiss/break enchantment/break possession.

name: Dominate Person
description: Humanoid WIS save or charmed and command (advantage when damaged). Upcast: 6th=10min/7th=1h/8th+=8h.

name: Dream
components: V S M (handful of sand, dab of ink, writing quill plucked from sleeping bird)
description: Touch sleeping creature on same plane. Send/receive message; deliver nightmare (3d6 psychic + no rest).

name: Flame Strike
description: 10ft radius × 40ft cylinder. DEX save half. 4d6 fire + 4d6 radiant. Upcast +1d6 fire OR radiant per slot.

name: Geas
description: WIS save or charmed; if disobeys command 5d10 psychic 1/day. Upcast: duration scales 6th=1y/7-8th=trigger or 1y/9th=until ended.

name: Greater Restoration
description: End one: charmed/petrified/curse/HP max reduction/exhaustion level.

name: Hallow
description: 60ft radius. Excludes specified creature type. Adds chosen secondary effect (courage/darkness/daylight/energy protection/everlasting rest/extradimensional interference/fear/silence/tongues).

name: Hold Monster
components: V S M (small straight piece of iron)
description: Non-undead WIS save or paralyzed. Save end of turn. Upcast +1 target per slot.

name: Insect Plague
components: V S M (a few grains of sugar, kernels of grain, smear of fat)
description: 20ft radius locust swarm. Difficult terrain + lightly obscured. CON save half 4d10 piercing on entry/start of turn. Upcast +1d10 per slot.

name: Legend Lore
components: V S M (incense 250gp + 4 ivory strips 50gp each - consumed)
description: Brief lore about person/place/object known by name.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
description: Up to 6 creatures in 30ft radius regain 3d8 + spellcasting mod HP. Upcast +1d8 per slot.

name: Mislead
description: Become invisible + create illusory duplicate. Use action to switch senses with duplicate.

name: Modify Memory
description: WIS save or charmed and incapacitated. Modify memory of past 24h event.

name: Passwall
components: V S M (a pinch of sesame seeds)
description: 5ft × 8ft × 20ft passage through wood/plaster/stone.

name: Planar Binding
components: V S M (jewel worth at least 1000 gp - consumed)
description: Bind celestial/elemental/fey/fiend to service. CHA save. Upcast: duration scales (10 days/30 days/180 days/1 year).

name: Raise Dead
description: Restore creature dead ≤10 days. Returns with 1 HP. Penalties for 4 long rests (-4 to attacks/saves/checks).

name: Reincarnate
components: V S M (rare oils and unguents 1000gp - consumed)
description: Creature dead ≤10 days returns in new randomly determined humanoid body.

name: Scrying
description: WIS save by target or you observe via invisible sensor; bonuses/penalties depend on familiarity.

name: Seeming
description: Change appearance of any number of creatures (size +/-1ft). CHA save resists. Reveals to physical inspection.

name: Telekinesis
description: Action: move target. Creature: STR save vs spell DC. Move 30ft any direction. Object up to 1000lb manipulate.

name: Teleportation Circle
components: V M (rare chalks and inks 50gp - consumed)
description: 10ft circle teleports creatures in to permanent destination circle whose sigil sequence is known.

name: Tree Stride
description: Move 500ft step into one tree, exit out another of same kind.

name: Wall of Force
components: V S M (pinch of powder made by crushing a clear gemstone)
description: 10× 10ft panels (10 panels × 1in thick). Force barrier - blocks everything except teleport/Disintegrate.

name: Wall of Stone
components: V S M (small block of granite)
description: 10× 10ft panels (6 in thick). After concentration ends if anchored becomes permanent. Upcast +1 panel per slot.

name: Blade Barrier
description: 100ft long × 20ft high × 5ft thick (or 60ft radius ring × 20ft × 5ft). Difficult terrain. DEX save half 6d10 slashing on entry/start of turn.

name: Chain Lightning
components: V S M (bit of fur, piece of amber/glass/crystal rod, three silver pins)
description: Primary target + up to 3 secondaries within 30ft. DEX save half. 10d8 lightning each. Upcast +1 target per slot above 6th.

name: Circle of Death
components: V S M (powder of crushed black pearl 500gp - consumed)
description: 60ft radius. CON save half. 8d6 necrotic. Upcast +2d6 per slot.

name: Conjure Fey
description: Summon fey CR ≤6.

name: Contingency
components: V S M (statuette of yourself carved from ivory and decorated with gems 1500gp)
description: Stored spell ≤5th targets you when trigger occurs.

name: Create Undead
components: V S M (one clay pot filled with grave dirt + one clay pot filled with brackish water + 150gp black onyx stone for each corpse)
description: Create up to 3 ghouls (or higher undead at higher slots). Recast within 24h to maintain. Upcast: 7th=2 ghasts/wights, 8th=4, 9th=6 ghasts/wights/3 mummies.

name: Disintegrate
components: V S M (lodestone and pinch of dust)
description: DEX save. On fail 10d6+40 force; if reduces to 0 HP creature is disintegrated. Force damage. Upcast +3d6 per slot.

name: Eyebite
description: Action each turn: target you can see. WIS save or one of: asleep (6d6 max HP)/panicked (frightened+flee)/sickened (poisoned).

name: Find the Path
components: V S M (set of divinatory tools - bones/ivory sticks/cards/teeth/etc. 100gp)
description: Know shortest path to specified destination on same plane.

name: Flesh to Stone
components: V S M (pinch of lime, water, and earth)
description: CON save 3 times. 1 fail = restrained; 3 fails = petrified for duration; 3 success = ends.

name: Forbiddance
components: V S M (rare incense and powdered ruby 1000gp - consumed)
description: 40000 sq ft area. Excludes: travel via planar magic; chosen creature type takes 5d10 radiant or necrotic on entry.

name: Globe of Invulnerability
components: V S M (glass or crystal bead that shatters when spell ends)
description: 10ft radius. Spells of ≤5th level cast outside have no effect inside. Upcast: ≤slot-1 level.

name: Guards and Wards
components: V S M (burning incense, small piece of rare wood, crushed gems 10gp, powdered diamond, ruby and emerald 1000gp - consumed)
description: Ward 2500 sq ft area: fog/door enchantments/stairs/mist/special trap.

name: Harm
description: CON save half. 14d6 necrotic; HP max reduced (until long rest) by amount damaged.

name: Heal
description: Restore 70 HP; end blindness/deafness/diseases. Upcast +10 HP per slot.

name: Heroes' Feast
description: Up to 12 creatures consume feast: cured of diseases/poisons; immune to poison/frightened; advantage on WIS saves; +2d10 max HP and current HP. 24h.

name: Instant Summons
description: Mark object. Action to summon to hand from anywhere on same plane.

name: Irresistible Dance
description: Target dances. -10ft speed. Disadvantage on DEX saves and attacks. WIS save end of turn.

name: Magic Jar
components: V S M (a gem, crystal, reliquary, or some other ornamental container worth 500gp+)
description: Soul into jar. CHA save when targeting body to possess. Body soul into jar; you control body.

name: Mass Suggestion
components: V M (a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil)
description: Up to 12 creatures WIS save or follow ≤25 word suggestion. Upcast: 7th=10 days/8th=30/9th=1 year.

name: Move Earth
components: V S M (an iron blade and a small bag of fine sand)
description: Reshape dirt/sand/clay terrain. 40ft cube. 10 minutes per cube changed.

name: Planar Ally
description: Beseech otherworldly entity for one creature's aid (price negotiable; deity-dependent).

name: Programmed Illusion
components: V S M (a bit of fleece + jade dust 25gp)
description: 30ft cube illusion that triggers on condition. Up to 5 minutes of action.

name: Sunbeam
description: 60ft line. CON save half. 6d8 radiant + blinded. Action each turn to fire again.

name: True Seeing
components: V S M (an ointment for the eyes that costs 25 gp; is made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat - consumed)
description: Truesight 120ft.

name: Wall of Ice
components: V S M (a small piece of quartz)
description: 10×10 ft panels (10 total) or 10ft radius hemisphere/dome. AC 12; 30 HP per panel. DEX save 10d6 cold on creation if creature in space. Broken: 5d6 cold to creatures within 5ft. Upcast: damage +2d6.

name: Wall of Thorns
components: V S M (a handful of thorns)
description: 60ft long × 10ft high × 5ft thick. DEX save half 7d8 piercing on creation. Difficult terrain + 7d8 slashing on entry/start of turn. Upcast +1d8 each per slot.

name: Word of Recall
description: Teleport you and up to 5 willing creatures within 5ft to designated sanctuary.

name: Conjure Celestial
description: Summon celestial CR ≤4 (CR 5 at 9th slot).

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
components: V S M (tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)
description: Glowing bead. Each turn +1d6 damage. End: 20ft radius. DEX save half. 12d6 fire (+ accumulated). Upcast: starts at +1d6 per slot.

name: Divine Word
description: Up to any creature CHA save (HP 20 or less = die). Else: 30 or less stunned 1h; 40 or less deafened 1min; 50 or less blinded 1min.

name: Etherealness
description: Step into Border Ethereal. Move freely; can't be touched by Material plane. Upcast +1 target per slot above 7th.

name: Finger of Death
description: CON save half. 7d8+30 necrotic. Killed humanoid rises as zombie under your control on next turn.

name: Fire Storm
description: 10× 10ft cubes (10 total). DEX save half 7d10 fire.

name: Forcecage
components: V S M (ruby dust 1500 gp - consumed)
description: 20ft cube cage or 10ft cube box. Solid (or barred) force. Teleport CHA save fail.

name: Mirage Arcane
description: 1 mile sq terrain reshaped. Solid; tactile; movement matches new terrain.

name: Plane Shift
components: V S M (forked metal rod 250gp attuned to destination)
description: Up to 8 creatures (CHA save willing/unwilling) to other plane. Or banish single target.

name: Prismatic Spray
description: Cone d8 colors per creature: red(10d6 fire)/orange(10d6 acid)/yellow(10d6 lightning)/green(10d6 poison)/blue(10d6 cold)/indigo(restrained then petrified)/violet(blinded then planar)/double effect.

name: Project Image
components: V S M (a small replica of you made from materials worth 5 gp)
description: Send illusory duplicate to known location. Can see/hear through it; project speech.

name: Regenerate
components: V S M (a prayer wheel and holy water)
description: Restore 4d8+15 HP + regrow body parts. 1 HP/min for duration.

name: Resurrection
description: Restore creature dead ≤100 years. Full HP. -4 attacks/saves/checks for 4 long rests.

name: Reverse Gravity
components: V S M (a lodestone and iron filings)
description: 50ft radius × 100ft cylinder. Falling reverses up. DEX save grab fixed object.

name: Sequester
components: V S M (a powder composed of diamond, emerald, ruby, and sapphire dust worth at least 5,000 gp - consumed)
description: Hide creature/object: invisible + suspended animation if creature.

name: Simulacrum
components: V S M (snow or ice in quantities sufficient + powdered ruby 1500gp + hair/nail clipping/bit of body part - consumed)
description: Illusory duplicate of beast/humanoid (max HP halved). No magic. 8h work to repair.

name: Symbol
components: V S M (mercury, phosphorus, and powdered diamond and opal with a total value of at least 1000 gp - consumed)
description: Glyph triggers chosen mode: death/discord/fear/hopelessness/insanity/pain/sleep/stunning. 60ft radius effect.

name: Teleport
description: Up to 8 willing creatures. Familiarity rolls (permanent circle/associated object/very familiar/seen casually/viewed once/false destination).

name: Animal Shapes
description: Transform any number of willing creatures into beasts CR ≤4.

name: Antimagic Field
components: V S M (a pinch of powdered iron or iron filings)
description: Sphere where magic doesn't function: spells suppressed; magic items suppressed; Antimagic Field cancels other Antimagic Field on overlap.

name: Clone
components: V S M (diamond 1000gp - consumed + at least 1 cubic inch of flesh from body to be cloned + sealable vessel large enough to hold a Medium creature)
description: Grow inert clone of creature touched. Soul transfers if original dies.

name: Control Weather
components: V S M (burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water)
description: Change weather (1d4×10 minutes per stage). Precipitation/Temperature/Wind: shift one step in either direction.

name: Demiplane
description: Door opens to demiplane (30ft cube). Reuse same demiplane.

name: Dominate Monster
description: Creature WIS save or charmed. Telepathic command. Save end of each turn.

name: Earthquake
components: V S M (a pinch of dirt, piece of rock, lump of clay)
description: 100ft radius. Concentration save (DC 10) for casters. Movement save or fall prone. Fissures (1d6 fissures) = DEX save vs fall to 1d6×10 ft. Structures take 50 bludgeoning per turn.

name: Feeblemind
components: V S M (a handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres)
description: INT save half. 4d6 psychic. On fail INT and CHA = 1; can't cast/understand language. Save every 30 days. End: greater restoration/heal/wish/remove curse.

name: Glibness
description: Replace CHA check d20 with 15. Magic detecting lies report truth.

name: Holy Aura
description: 30ft radius. Friendly creatures: advantage on saves; attackers fiend/undead and hit it CON save or blinded.

name: Incendiary Cloud
description: 20ft radius cloud. DEX save half 10d8 fire on entry/start of turn. Heavily obscured. Moves 10ft per turn.

name: Maze
description: Banish creature to demiplane labyrinth. Action: INT check DC 20 to escape. Returns at end of duration.

name: Mind Blank
description: Immune to psychic damage; immune to thought-reading; immune to charm; immune to wish-effects.

name: Power Word Stun
description: Target with HP ≤150: stunned. Save end of each turn.

name: Sunburst
components: V S M (fire and a piece of sunstone)
description: 60ft radius. CON save half. 12d6 radiant + blinded 1 minute.

name: Telepathy
components: V S M (a pair of linked silver rings)
description: Telepathic communication with willing known creature on same plane.

name: Astral Projection
components: V S M (jacinth 1000 gp + ornately carved bar of silver 100 gp - consumed for each willing creature)
description: Up to 8 creatures Astral plane projection. Bodies in stasis. Severing silver cord = lost forever.

name: Foresight
description: Touched creature: advantage on attacks/saves/checks; attackers disadvantage on attacks vs them.

name: Gate
description: 20ft circular portal to another plane. Specify named being to summon (CHA save).

name: Imprisonment
components: V S M (vellum depiction or carved statue of victim + special component varying by version 500gp/HD)
description: Bind creature: Burial/Chaining/Hedged Prison/Minimus Containment/Slumber. WIS save resists.

name: Mass Heal
description: Restore 700 HP divided among any creatures within 60ft. Cures blindness/deafness/disease.

name: Meteor Swarm
description: 4 meteors at chosen 40ft radius spheres. DEX save half. 20d6 fire + 20d6 bludgeoning each.

name: Power Word Heal
description: Touched creature regains all HP; ends charmed/frightened/paralyzed/stunned; up if prone.

name: Power Word Kill
description: Target with HP ≤100 dies. No save.

name: Prismatic Wall
description: 90ft long × 30ft high or 30ft radius sphere. 7 layers (each 10 HP). Each color different effect: red/orange/yellow/green/blue/indigo/violet. Pass through: damage/condition by layer.

name: Shapechange
description: Become creature CR ≤ your level. New stats. Repeat as action to change form.

name: Storm of Vengeance
description: 360ft radius storm. Round 1: thunder (CON save). Round 2: acid rain. Round 3: 6 lightning bolts (DEX). Round 4: 6 hailstones (CON). Rounds 5-10: cold rain (CON or 1d6 cold).

name: Time Stop
description: 1d4+1 turns of free action. Ends if you affect creature other than self/objects worn or carried by other creatures.

name: True Polymorph
components: V S M (a drop of mercury, a dollop of gum arabic, and a wisp of smoke)
description: Object↔creature/creature↔creature/object↔object. Lasts duration. After full duration: permanent.

name: True Resurrection
components: V S M (a sprinkle of holy water and diamonds 25000gp - consumed)
description: Restore creature dead ≤200 years (any cause). Full HP. New body if needed.

name: Weird
description: Each creature in 30ft radius WIS save or frightened + 4d10 psychic each turn. Save end of each turn.

name: Wish
description: Mightiest spell. Duplicate any spell ≤8th OR variant effects (heal 20 creatures/grant +10 AC&saves/recreate magic item/undo turn/etc). Stress: 33% chance never cast wish again; STR 3; -1d10 HP per slot expended; need long rests; -1 AC.
